titleStmt.title: SII 9.488: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 488. (A.R. No. 181 of 1924.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE THIRD PRAKARA OF THE KALAHASTISVARA TEMPLE AT KALAHASTI, CHANDRAGIRI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1434, Āṅgirasa, Phālguṇa, śu. 5, corresponding to A.D. 1513 February 10 Thursday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇadēva-Mahārāya. It records that the king made a gift of a pearl neck-lace and a neck-lace of precious stones, a gold cup inlaid with precious stones, giriy-ārati inlaid with precious stones, a gold plate and 25 silver plates for ārati, to the god Kāḷahastīśvara. The inscription is written in Nāgarī characters.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīvijayādbhudayaśālivāhanasakavarṣaṁgaḷu 1434 saṁdu mele naḍava Āṁgirasasaṁvatsarada pālguṇa su 5 lu śrīmaṁmnahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrīvīrakriṣṇarāyamahārāyaru srīkālahastiśvaradevarige samarppista muttu 61 madhyanāyadanila 1 kusuri 2 saha tūka 18�1 ge kaṁṭhamāle 1 mattaṁ kaṁṭhamāle 1 ke muttu 20 māṇike 18 nila 2 tuṁbida
kusuri 38 ke tuka 17�4 ge māṇikada kaṁṭhamāle 1 Ubhaya kaṁṭhamāle 2 madhyamāṇikavikkida saṁtardāreya cinnada baṭṭalu 1 kke 226 cinnada purṣāmṛgada Ārati 1 giriyarati 1 kke muttu 22 keṁpu 24 pacce 5 sahā Ārati 1
beḷiya Ārati 25 yiṣṭanu taṁma seveyāgi samarpisi cittayistaru maṁgala mahā śrī śrī śrī ṟoyūri rāmana vrāta śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.488 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
